title: vicia noeana
intro: Vicia noeana, also known as Nootka vetch or mountain vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the western United States and western Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it a potential treatment for digestive issues and muscle spasms. The plant's health benefits may include relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure. Vicia noeana can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
